title: taraxacum limnoticum
intro: Taraxacum limnoticum, commonly known as the aquatic dandelion or marsh dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum limnoticum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum limnoticum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
